description: The Carvelli are a 'ndrina (organized crime family) of the 'Ndrangheta, originating from Petilia Policastro in the province of Crotone, Calabria. They have expanded operations to northern Italy, particularly Milan (Quarto Oggiaro) and Turin, with a focus on drug trafficking. The group has been involved in murders and vendettas, and maintains alliances with other local 'ndrine such as the Trovato and Comberiati-Garofalo families. Recent operations have targeted their drug networks in the Milan area.
